prestazioni: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger upgrade for the GDI 1.6L T-GDi (engine code: *G4FJ*) with a custom 3.5-bar MAP sensor and a PTP Performance silicone charge pipe kit to eliminate boost leaks under 1.5 bar of pressure, targeting 320 HP at the crank with a supporting fuel system upgrade including a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump and Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors

Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover suspension kit (part #: OH-KIA-01) with custom valving for the Pro Ceed GT’s 5x114.3 bolt pattern, paired with Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro SPF0115K) to reduce body roll and improve turn-in response on Nürburgring-style circuits

Custom ECU remap via Syvecs S6Plus standalone engine management system (plug-and-play for G4FJ) with flex-fuel capability, anti-lag for turbo spool, and launch control optimized for the Pro Ceed GT’s 6-speed DCT (wet-clutch reinforcement via Sachs Performance clutch kit #3000 951 051), achieving 0-60 mph in 4.8 seconds with a 13.2-second quarter-mile at 108 mph on 98 RON fuel
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (Pandem Design) for the Pro Ceed GT, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with aggressive 30mm flares, a custom rear diffuser with integrated twin 3.5-inch exhaust outlets (custom fabrication by Milltek Sport), and a 20mm extended rear bumper to accommodate the Ohlins coilovers’ lowered ride height

Custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap with a satin clear coat over the entire body, including the roof, mirrors, and front grille (replaced with a Seibon carbon fiber unit), paired with a custom front splitter from Varis Japan (adapted for the Pro Ceed GT’s bumper) and a 50mm adjustable rear wing from APR Performance (GTC-200 model)

Enkei PF07 wheels in 18x9.5 +35 offset (front) and 18x10.5 +40 offset (rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear), powder-coated in BBS Gold, and paired with DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors and Ferodo DS2500 brake pads for track-ready stopping power
